targets.rawSql: SELECT uniqExactIf(call_id, event_type = 'call.failed') AS failed_calls, countIf(event_type = 'provider.failed') AS provider_errors, uniqExactIf(call_id, event_type = 'pipeline.corked') AS calls_affected_by_backpressure, countIf(event_type = 'pipeline.stale_chunk_dropped') AS stale_chunks_dropped, countIf(event_type = 'webhook.failed') AS webhook_failures FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

SELECT $__timeInterval(event_time) AS time, stage, provider, reason_code, count() AS errors FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type IN ('provider.failed','provider.timeout') GROUP BY time, stage, provider, reason_code ORDER BY time

SELECT stage, countIf(event_type = 'pipeline.corked') AS cork_events, avgIf(duration_ms, event_type = 'pipeline.uncorked' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL) AS avg_cork_duration_ms, quantileExactIf(0.95)(duration_ms, event_type = 'pipeline.uncorked' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL) AS p95_cork_duration_ms, uniqExactIf(call_id, event_type = 'pipeline.corked') AS calls_with_cork_events, countIf(event_type = 'pipeline.stale_chunk_dropped') AS stale_chunks_dropped FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY stage HAVING cork_events > 0 OR stale_chunks_dropped > 0 ORDER BY cork_events DESC

SELECT countIf(event_type = 'user.barge_in_candidate') AS candidates, countIf(event_type = 'user.barge_in_confirmed') AS confirmed, countIf(event_type = 'user.barge_in_rejected') AS rejected, if(countIf(event_type = 'user.barge_in_candidate') = 0, 0, countIf(event_type = 'user.barge_in_confirmed') / countIf(event_type = 'user.barge_in_candidate')) AS confirmation_rate FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

SELECT reason_code, count() AS ignored_turns, uniqExact(call_id) AS affected_calls FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'vad.noise_turn_ignored' GROUP BY reason_code ORDER BY ignored_turns DESC

SELECT event_time, event_type, call_id, turn_id, response_id, stage, provider, status, reason_code, latency_ms, duration_ms, trace_id FROM voice_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) ORDER BY event_time DESC, sequence DESC LIMIT 200
